chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-632 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of M.A No.7783/2025 (Return of surety) 29.12.2025 Mr.Meer Ahmed Mangrio, Advocate for the applicant/surety Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G ********* Through listed application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant/surety states that vide Order dated 10.06.2025, the applicant/accused Sodho son of Muhammad Rahimoon was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further stated that vide Order dated 16.06.2025, the bail was dismissed and interim bail earlier granted to the applicant/accused was recalled, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
